raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A review of this section centrally includes checking whether the pipeline description, evaluation claims, and stated conclusions cohere logically.","R1.3":"The section reports specific performance and robustness claims, so review should assess whether those claims are supported by the described evaluation evidence.","R1.5":"Because the artifact is a full section, review reasonably includes whether the sequence from framework to pipeline to evaluation forms an effective section-level narrative.","R1.6":"The delegation most directly asks for section review, making sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, tense, and flow load-bearing responsibilities.","RX.1":"The reviewer should flag uncertainty where evidence, citations, calibration status, or evaluation scope is not fully established in the text.","RX.2":"The reviewer should identify and avoid overstatements such as broad robustness or competitiveness claims not fully supported by the reported evaluation.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within reviewing the section rather than rewriting it, executing the work, or evaluating unstated experimental design details.","RX.4":"Because the topic concerns medical imaging, review should be sensitive to claims that could mislead downstream clinical or research interpretation.","RX.5":"Any review judgments should remain traceable to specific wording, reported numbers, named datasets, and cited prior-work references in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A review of this section centrally includes checking whether the pipeline description, evaluation claims, and stated conclusions cohere logically.
rationale.R1.3: The section reports specific performance and robustness claims, so review should assess whether those claims are supported by the described evaluation evidence.
rationale.R1.5: Because the artifact is a full section, review reasonably includes whether the sequence from framework to pipeline to evaluation forms an effective section-level narrative.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation most directly asks for section review, making sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, tense, and flow load-bearing responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: The reviewer should flag uncertainty where evidence, citations, calibration status, or evaluation scope is not fully established in the text.
rationale.RX.2: The reviewer should identify and avoid overstatements such as broad robustness or competitiveness claims not fully supported by the reported evaluation.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within reviewing the section rather than rewriting it, executing the work, or evaluating unstated experimental design details.
rationale.RX.4: Because the topic concerns medical imaging, review should be sensitive to claims that could mislead downstream clinical or research interpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Any review judgments should remain traceable to specific wording, reported numbers, named datasets, and cited prior-work references in the artifact.
